_comment: ChEBI Test Cases - Note: ChEBI only stores cross-references, not primary searchable entries
_note: ChEBI data structure: ChEBI parses database_accession.tsv which contains mappings from ChEBI IDs to other databases (UniProt, GO, etc.). These are stored as inverse cross-references on the target database entries, not as primary ChEBI entries.

common_tests.name: ChEBI IDs file exists
common_tests.description: Verify ChEBI IDs were logged during database build

common_tests.name: ChEBI processed 100 IDs
common_tests.description: Verify test limit of 100 ChEBI IDs was respected

custom_tests.name: ChEBI cross-references information
custom_tests.description: Custom test to explain ChEBI's cross-reference structure
